name: Max Reinhardt
abstract: Max Reinhardt (German: [maks ˈʁaɪnhaʁt] ; born Maximilian Goldmann; 9 September 1873 – 30 October 1943) was an Austrian-born theatre and film director, intendant, and theatrical producer. With his radically innovative and avant-garde stage productions, Reinhardt is regarded as one of the most prominent stage directors of the early 20th c…

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: He got a job working for the famous director Max Reinhardt... My father wrote a couple of plays... My father had one good friend, a movie director named John Brahm, who is best known for a film noir called The Lodger... John Brahm is somebody my father had met when he worked for Max Reinhardt as a y
